card1.title: Consistent Client Flow
card1.body: Build a predictable system for acquiring new clients.

card2.title: Optimized Ad Spend
card2.body: No wasted budget — every campaign is tracked and refined.

card3.title: CRM
card3.body: Structured follow-ups and shuttle letters orchestrated for you.

services.ctaBody: We'll go over your current situation and identify opportunities to increase your client flow.
services.info: We'll go over your current situation and identify opportunities to increase your client flow.

traditional.title: Traditional Agency
items: They execute. You don't understand what's happening
No real understanding of your market
If they leave, you're left with nothing

flowtica.title: Flowtica Approach
items: We work with you, not just for you
You understand the system — and keep it
Strategy built around your business, not templates
Built on your data, your market, your growth

steps.title: Diagnosis & Audit
steps.body: We analyze your business, understand your ideal client, and identify what's holding your results back. We review your ads, your offer, and your sales process to find clear opportunities.

steps.title: Strategy & Direction
steps.body: We define your client, your angles, and what content will perform. You get a structured plan with clear direction — built specifically for your business.

steps.title: Production & Implementation
steps.body: We help you create the ads and copy. You provide the material — we handle the execution and setup inside Meta Ads.

steps.title: Optimization & Scaling
steps.body: We review results with you, adjust what's not working, and scale what is. You learn how to read the numbers and build a system that grows consistently.

form.title: Let's talk growth!
form.subtitle: Tell us about your business and goals
checklist: You're the business owner or decision-maker
You're looking to get more clients or improve your ads
You're ready to invest in growing your business
form.privacy: This is for business owners serious about growth.
form.privacyNote: All information is kept private and used only to understand your business needs.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business and your goals…
form.success: Message sent — we'll be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.comingSoonBody: This section isn't available yet. Check back soon.

foundation.intro: We step into your business, build the system, and make sure you understand it. Because a business owner who understands their own growth doesn't depend on anyone.

steps.title: Market Research
steps.body: We analyze your market and define your ideal client.

steps.title: Communication Structure
steps.body: We define what to say, how to say it, and where it works best.

steps.title: Content Creation
steps.body: You record — we turn it into ready-to-use content.

steps.title: Ad Implementation
steps.body: We guide your campaigns step-by-step inside Meta Ads.

steps.title: Optimization
steps.body: We test, adjust, and improve during the first 30 days.

steps.title: Direct Mentorship
steps.body: We explain what we do and why it works — so you understand everything.

aboutTeam: We're not an agency where you're just a number.
We're a focused team of specialists, working together to build a strategy tailored to your business — not a generic plan reused across clients.
foundation.ourFocus: A complete client acquisition system through Meta Ads — combining strategy, creative, and execution to generate consistent, predictable results.
foundation.quote: The biggest mistake isn't hiring an agency. It's doing it without understanding what your business actually needs.
foundation.quoteFooter: Because if you don't know — no one will know better.
foundation.ctaBody: Let's talk about your business and see how we can help you grow.

mission.title: Helping owners build growth they truly understand.
mission.intro: Our mission is to give business owners the system, the clarity, and the confidence to grow without depending on anyone.

pillars.title: Clarity
pillars.body: Every decision is backed by data you can read.

pillars.title: Ownership
pillars.body: You leave the engagement owning the system, not renting it.

pillars.title: Compounding growth
pillars.body: We design systems that get better the longer they run.
